zh.lifeSummary: 當Tudor Goch ap Gronwy於1300年出生在威爾士凱爾納方史爾利安德萊格時，他的父親Gronwy ap Einion30歲，母親Generis Verch Gwyn36歲。他於1339年與Morfudd ferch Hywel在威爾士凱爾納方史爾格林利方結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1352年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Tudor Goch ap Gronwy于1300年出生在威尔士凱爾納方史爾利安德萊格时，他的父亲Gronwy ap Einion30岁，母亲Generis Verch Gwyn36岁。他于1339年与Morfudd ferch Hywel在威尔士凱爾納方史爾格林利方结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于1352年之后。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Geza, Jeno, Arpad, Attila, Csaba.

Hungarian: variant of   Papp  , meaning ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’. This surname is also found in Romania, Slovakia, Croatia, and Serbia, and also among Rusyns (in Serbia and Croatia). See also   Pop   2 and   Popa  .

variants.name: Papp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Laszlo, Zoltan, Geza, Istvan, Gabor, Miklos, Tibor, Arpad, Denes, Imre, Attila.
German (Bavaria, Tyrol): from Middle High German pap ‘baby food’, Dutch pap ‘porridge, pap’, hence perhaps a nickname denoting someone who had lost his teeth or subsisted on a meager diet.

Hungarian: from pap ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’, probably an occupational name for someone in the service of a priest or a nickname for a pious person. This surname is also found in Romania and Slovakia, and also among Rusyns. Compare Pap and Pop .

nameMeanings.name: Gronwy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Gronow
meanings: Welsh: relationship name from the Welsh personal name Goronwy (also found as Gronw and Gronow, from Old Welsh Guorgonui).

nameMeanings.name: Tudor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from the Old Celtic form Teutorix, composed of elements meaning ‘people, tribe’ and ‘ruler, king’. It has been described as a Welsh form of Theodore, but there is no connection between them, though it is ultimately akin to the Germanic name Theodoric ( see Terry ).

variants.name: Tudyr
meanings: Traditional: from the Old Celtic form Teutorix, composed of elements meaning ‘people, tribe’ and ‘ruler, king’. It has been described as a Welsh form of Theodore, but there is no connection between them, though it is ultimately akin to the Germanic name Theodoric ( see Terry ).

nameMeanings.name: Goch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Tudor Goch ap Gronwy was born in 1300, in Llandwrog, Caernarfonshire, Wales, his father, Gronwy ap Einion, was 30 and his mother, Generis Verch Gwyn, was 36. He married Morfudd ferch Hywel in 1339, in Glynllifon, Caernarfonshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died after 1352.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Tudor Goch ap Gronwy est né en 1300, à Llandwrog, Caernarfonshire, Galles, son père, Gronwy ap Einion, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Generis Verch Gwyn, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Morfudd ferch Hywel en 1339, à Glynllifon, Caernarfonshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé après 1352.

de.lifeSummary: Als Tudor Goch ap Gronwy 1300 in Llandwrog, Caernarfonshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gronwy ap Einion 30 und seine Mutter Generis Verch Gwyn 36. Er hat 1339 in Glynllifon, Caernarfonshire, Wales Morfudd ferch Hywel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb nach 1352.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Tudor Goch ap Gronwy è nato il nel 1300 nel Llandwrog, Caernarfonshire, Galles, il suo padre, Gronwy ap Einion, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Generis Verch Gwyn, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Morfudd ferch Hywel nel 1339, nel Glynllifon, Caernarfonshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì dopo il 1352.

ja.lifeSummary: Tudor Goch ap Gronwyが1300年にウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアランドウログで生まれた時，父Gronwy ap Einionは30歳，母Generis Verch Gwynは36歳であった。1339年にウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアグリンリフォンでMorfudd ferch Hywelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1352年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Tudor Goch ap Gronwy(이)가 1300년 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 랜드로그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gronwy ap Einion(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Generis Verch Gwyn(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1339년 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 그린리폰에서 Morfudd ferch Hywel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1352년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Tudor Goch ap Gronwy nasceu em 1300, em Llandwrog, Caernarfonshire, Gales, seu pai, Gronwy ap Einion, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Generis Verch Gwyn, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Morfudd ferch Hywel em 1339, em Glynllifon, Caernarfonshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu após 1352.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Tudor Goch ap Gronwy родился в 1300 г. в местности лландрог, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Gronwy ap Einion было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Generis Verch Gwyn, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Morfudd ferch Hywel в 1339 г. в местности глинллифон, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер после 1352 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Tudor Goch ap Gronwy nació en 1300, en Llandwrog, Caernarfonshire, Gales, su papá, Gronwy ap Einion, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Generis Verch Gwyn, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Morfudd ferch Hywel en 1339, en Glynllifon, Caernarfonshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió después de 1352.
